basic_details.job_title: Allahabad High Court Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - ₹40,000/Month for Law Graduates
basic_details.short_information: OrganizationHigh Court of Judicature at Allahabad PostResearch Associate Honorarium₹40,000 / month Application StartJune 6, 2026 Last Date to ApplyJune 20, 2026 (11:59 PM) Mode of ApplicationOnline Only Application Fee₹500 + bank charges Official Websiteallahabadhighcourt.in

qualification.details: ✓5-year integrated LL.B. or 3-year LL.B. degree from a Bar Council of India (BCI) recognised university ✓Degree obtained in academic sessions 2024, 2025, or 2026 ✓Candidates awaiting final year LL.B. results in 2026 are also eligible to apply ✓Minimum 55% marks in LL.B. examination is mandatory ✓Working knowledge of computers - Data Entry, Word Processing, etc. | Candidates must have completed 21 years and not completed 26 years of age as on July 1 of the calendar year of vacancy notification. Age relaxation details, if any, will be as per High Court norms. | ✓Candidates with criminal cases (convicted or chargesheeted) are not eligible ✓Candidates who have already worked as Research Associate at this Court cannot apply again ✓Candidates having more than one living spouse are ineligible

selection_process: Category Criteria Marks
Hindi Language Class 10 or 12 marks (whichever higher): 70–80% = 1, >80–90% = 2, >90% = 5 Max 5
English Language Class 10 or 12 marks (whichever higher): 70–80% = 1, >80–90% = 2, >90% = 5 Max 5
LL.B. Academics Average % of LL.B. marks: 60–65% = 1, >65–75% = 3, >75–80% = 4, >80% = 5 Max 5
Moot Court / Research Paper College = 1, State/National = 3, International = 5 Max 5
Interview Grading Marks Awarded (out of 100)
Unsuitable 30
Passable 40
Good 60
Very Good 70
Exceptional / Outstanding 80
The selection is entirely merit-based
spread across three stages. Total weightage is 100 marks.
20 Stage A Language
Academics & Co-Curricular 60 Stage B Screening Test (Written) 20 Stage C Interview
These marks are awarded automatically based on documents uploaded at the time of application. No exam needed for this stage.
A 1-hour descriptive written test carrying 60 marks. The test will contain descriptive questions (no MCQ). It will be held on August 8
2026 at Prayagraj. Candidates shortlisted up to 3x the vacancies (or 150
as decided) will appear.
Note: These interview raw marks are then converted to 20% weightage for the final merit list.
how_to_apply: 2Click on the "Research Associates 2026 - Apply Online" link (active from June 6, 2026)
3Register and fill in the online application form with personal, academic, and co-curricular details
4Upload all required documents: Class 10 & 12 marksheets, LL.B. year-wise marksheets, co-curricular certificates, and CGPA conversion document (if applicable)
5Pay the application fee of ₹500 + bank charges via online mode only
7Download and save the final submitted application form for future reference

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Allahabad HC Research Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is June 20, 2026 at 11:59 PM. The last date to update payment details is June 23, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Research Associate at Allahabad High Court?
faq.answer: The fixed honorarium is ₹40,000 per month, subject to upward revision. No other allowances like HRA or accommodation are provided.

faq.question: Q3. Can final year LL.B. students apply for Allahabad HC Research Associate 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates who appeared in the LL.B. Final Year examination in 2026 and are awaiting results are also eligible to apply. However, they must produce their final year marksheet at the time of joining.

faq.question: Q4. Is Allahabad High Court Research Associate a permanent job?
faq.answer: No. It is a purely contractual engagement for 1 year, extendable up to 3 years based on satisfactory performance. The maximum tenure is 3 years. The engagement can be terminated at any time without prior notice.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for Research Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹500 plus applicable bank charges. Payment must be made through online mode only.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the Screening Test be held for Allahabad HC Research Associate?
faq.answer: The Screening Test and Interview are scheduled on August 8, 2026, and will be held at Prayagraj (Allahabad). Both stages may be conducted on the same day.
